name: Squid with Sichuan Pepper Corn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the sauce ingredients well.
2. Wash and clean the squid, then drain it. Open out the squid, remove the membrane, and flatten it out. Make diagonal criss-cross incisions, then cut into 12 bite-sized pieces.
3. Bring stock (or water) to a boil and cook the squid until it curls. Remove quickly from the heat, drain, mix with the sauce mixture, and spoon into a serving dish.
